subject: English
title: Media Literacy
tagline: Analyse advertisements, news articles and social media bias!

fact: Cape Town hosted the 2010 World Cup matches.
Table Mountain is in Cape Town.
opinion: That was the best movie ever.
Soccer is more exciting than rugby.
This is the tastiest food in town.
bias: Everyone knows the other side is wrong.
